creator: Karli.Sjoberg@slu.se
text:
I have looked through that troubleshooting wiki until my eyes bled:) Didn´t give me anything. Since it is working in _both_ Ubuntu and CentOS, there _has_ to be something wrong in FreeBSD.

The question I asked was: "Have anyone ever gotten sssd working towards AD in FreeBSD at all?"

Best Regards
Karli Sjöberg
